title: Wawa - Upper Providence Township, PA - PH&C
excerpt: Key Features: Asbestos/hazardous material abatement and demolition of 3 structures, including the existing Wawa store. 5,051 SF Food Market with 10 fuel stations Improvements to access, parking and blacktop surfaces for neighboring business, QystTire.com Automotive Service Centers. Landscape improvements and retaining walls for neighboring residences. Individual NPDES Permit PennDOT & Township access & signal improvements. […]
contentHtml:
Key Features:

  • Asbestos/hazardous material abatement and demolition of 3 structures, including the existing Wawa store.
  • 5,051 SF Food Market with 10 fuel stations
  • Improvements to access, parking and blacktop surfaces for neighboring business, QystTire.com Automotive Service Centers.
  • Landscape improvements and retaining walls for neighboring residences.
  • Individual NPDES Permit
  • PennDOT & Township access & signal improvements.

https://www.wawa.com/
